markdownRemark.html: If you hate RealPlayer as much as I do then you might find RealPlayer Enterprise useful. It’s had most of the annoyances removed and although you have to register to download it it doesn’t try and take over your computer quite as much when you install it.

frontmatter.title: NVidia ForceWare Network Manager vs. SonicWall VPN Client
Voluntary Sector Project of the Year
